name: Moving Average Features
description: This node computes various global moving average features from a DataFrame containing transactional data.
input: It takes a DataFrame with date, and optionally user, amount, quantity columns.
output: Returns the original DataFrame with new global moving average feature columns appended.

fields.name: dateCol
fields.title: Date/Timestamp Column
fields.description: Column representing the transaction date or timestamp.

fields.name: userCol
fields.title: User ID Column
fields.description: Column representing the user or entity ID.

fields.name: enable_global_moving_avg_txn_count_per_day
fields.title: Enable Global Moving Avg Txn Count Per Day
fields.description: Global average transaction count per day over the window.

fields.name: enable_global_moving_avg_gap_days
fields.title: Enable Global Moving Avg Gap Days
fields.description: Global average gap days between transactions over the window.

fields.name: enable_global_hourly_avg_txn_count
fields.title: Enable Global Hourly Avg Txn Count
fields.description: Global average transaction count per hour over the window.

fields.name: enable_global_daily_avg_amount
fields.title: Enable Global Daily Avg Amount (Required: Amount)
fields.description: Global average amount per day over the window.

fields.name: enable_global_moving_avg_amount
fields.title: Enable Global Moving Avg Amount (Required: Amount)
fields.description: Global average transaction amount over the window.

fields.name: enable_global_moving_avg_sales_per_day
fields.title: Enable Global Moving Avg Sales Per Day (Required: Quantity)
fields.description: Global average sales (quantity) per day over the window.

fields.name: enable_global_moving_avg_unique_users_per_day
fields.title: Enable Global Moving Avg Unique Users Per Day (Required: User)
fields.description: Global average unique users per day over the window.
